articles.content: Backyard cookouts, gardening, and firefly chasing arent the only things that ramp up in warm weather. Its also tick season, and being outdoors puts you one step closer to these disease-carrying pests… [+5290 chars]

articles.title: 3 Everyday Habits with More Blood Pressure Benefits Than Daily Walks - EatingWell
articles.description: A cardiologist and a dietitian share their expert tips for battling hypertension. Dietary changes, getting enough hydration and sleeping sufficiently can all combat high blood pressure.
articles.content: Some call it the silent killer. High blood pressure, also known as hypertension, may seem relatively innocuous when you get a high reading at your annual checkup, but it can mean long-term trouble. I… [+6245 chars]
